untranslatable_reason: Signal requires direct measurement of 'consensus indicator' (70-80% participant alignment), 'explanatory power of price action' (<50%), and explicit contrarian signal identification. These are qualitative/meta-analysis concepts not measurable by standard price-based technical indicators. No allowed indicator directly measures market consensus sentiment or causal attribution of price moves. Approximated with contrarian RSI/Stochastic extremes and low ADX (indicating weak conventional trend), but this is a heuristic proxy only.
translation_notes: Contrarian entry signals approximated using stochastic extremes (opposite of crowd) combined with low ADX (weak consensus trend). High Stochastic with low RSI suggests price divergence from momentum (contrarian setup). Exit on momentum reversal (RSI/Stoch crossing midpoint) or 2x risk target approximated via extended hold window. Position sizing (50% allocation) noted but not encoded in rules—implement at portfolio level. Original signal philosophy about seeing what others miss cannot be directly operationalized without sentiment/consensus data feeds.
